author: @erastuskihara9559
clean_text:
I am reliably informed that Diana’s late white husband was a billionaire.

I think as a country we have dangerously normalized this nonsense of young men dating older women and laughing it off as if it’s some kind of achievement. Look at this, 26-year-old VJ Patello proudly parading his romantic relationship with 56-year-old Diana, and they even have the audacity to brag about it.

Where exactly did we lose our values? Is this what we were taught? To admire our mothers instead of building our own families? To call it love when in reality it is pure moral decay?

Some will try to defend it as “love has no age,” but let’s stop lying to ourselves. This is not about love, it’s about the collapse of family values. When a society begins to celebrate such things instead of condemning them, then we should know we are in serious trouble.

Our young men were raised to build families, to lead with dignity, and to respect womanhood, not to turn motherhood into a fantasy. Surely, who bewitched this generation?
